nl_edit_placeholder: ဒ်အဒိ "ဆီတလဲ consequence ဆူ teacher ဟ့ၣ်ကျဲတဘျီကဒီး"
reinforce_step_3: လဲၤဆူ schedule လၢအဆီတလဲ (VR) လၢ တၢ်ပၢၤပၢၤဃာ်အဂီၢ်လၢအအိၣ်ဒ်အလီၢ်လီၢ်
fidelity_tip_2: ဟ့ၣ်အါထီၣ် BST (Behavioral Skills Training)
fidelity_tip_4: ဆိကမိၣ်တၢ်အလီၢ်အကျဲ လၢအတြီတၢ်မၤလဲၤထီၣ်
record_tip_3: နသူ paste တၢ်မၤအသးအါမံၤသ့
quiz_opt_any_stops: တၢ်အိၣ်အသးခဲလၢာ်လၢ မၤပတုာ်တၢ်ကီတၢ်ခဲ
ph.add_a_team_note_shiftenter_for_new_li: ပာ်ဖှိၣ်ထီၣ် ကရၢအလံာ်အမှာ်... (Shift+Enter လၢကျိၤအသီ)
ph.add_context_constraints_or_specific_c: ပာ်ဖှိၣ်ထီၣ် တၢ်ဂ့ၢ်ခိၣ်ထီး, တၢ်တြီ, မ့တမ့ၢ် တၢ်ဂ့ၢ်ကီလီၤဆီ... ဒ်အဒိ, "ဖိသၣ်ဝံၤအိၣ်ဒီး speech delay" မ့တမ့ၢ် "အံၤမ့ၢ် middle school ဖိသၣ်"
ph.describe_the_student_persona_eg_you_a: ပာ်ဖျါ ကၠိဖိ persona... ဒ်အဒိ, "နမ့ၢ် 3rd grader လၢ ပျံၤတၢ်ဖဲ math အခါဒီး အိၣ်တၢ်ဟီၣ်တၢ်ယၢၤဒီး ပတုာ်ထွဲ..."
ph.eg_does_a_token_economy_reduce_offtas: ဒ်အဒိ "token economy မၤစှၤလီၤ off-task တၢ်အိၣ်အသးဖဲ math အခါဧါ?"
ph.eg_offtask_behavior_in_math: ဒ်အဒိ Off-task တၢ်အိၣ်အသးဖဲ math
ph.eg_spanish_arabic_somali: ဒ်အဒိ Spanish, Arabic, Somali…
ph.eg_student_with_autism_cooccurring_ad: ဒ်အဒိ "ကၠိဖိအိၣ်ဒီး autism", "ဒီးအိၣ်ဒီး ADHD", "အသီဆူကၠိ"
ph.eg_token_economy_fct_protocol: ဒ်အဒိ Token Economy + FCT Protocol
ph.enter_the_behavioral_goal_to_scale_eg: ဆဲးလီၤ တၢ်အိၣ်အသးအတၢ်ပညိၣ်လၢ scale (ဒ်အဒိ, "ကၠိဖိကအိၣ်လၢအဆ့ၣ်နီၤအလီၢ်ဖဲ မၤတၢ်ထဲတဂၤဧိၤ 15 မံးနံး")
ph.items_separated_by_semicolons: တၢ်ဖိတၢ်လံၤလၢ semicolon နီၤဖးအီၤ
ph.rationale_which_antecedent_does_this_: တၢ်ဂ့ၢ်ခိၣ်သ့ၣ် (antecedent လီၤလၢ်လီၤလၢ်လၢအဆှၢထီၣ်အီၤ?)
ph.search_terms_eg_reinforcement_fba_dat: 🔍 ဃုထံၣ်တၢ်ကတိၤ... (ဒ်အဒိ "reinforcement", "FBA", "data")
ph.setting_eg_math_class_cafeteria: တၢ်အလီၢ် (ဒ်အဒိ, Math class, Cafeteria)
ph.type_language_eg_spanish_arabic_somal: ဆဲးလီၤ ကျိာ် (ဒ်အဒိ, Spanish, Arabic, Somali)
ph.what_behavior_will_change: တၢ်အိၣ်အသးမနုၤလဲၣ်ကဆီတလဲ?
ph.what_environmental_change_will_you_ma: နကမၤ တၢ်အလီၢ်အကျဲ တၢ်ဆီတလဲမနုၤ?
ph.what_was_going_on_before_you_felt_thi: မနုၤလၢအမၤအသးတချုး နတူၢ်ဘၣ်ဒ်အံၤ?
toast.added_n_entries_to_abc_data: ပာ်ဖှိၣ်ထီၣ် N တၢ်ဆဲးလီၤဆူ ABC data!

toast.case_study_complete_review_your_de: case study လၢပှဲၤ! ကွၢ်ကဒါက့ၤ နတၢ်စံၣ်တဲၤတဲလီၤ.

toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl: graph data အိၣ်သးကတဲာ်ကတီၤ — တၢ်ဒိးထၢနုာ်ဒၣ်တၢ်အသးအိၣ်လၢ Effect Size!

toast.name_at_least_one_target_behavior: ဟ့ၣ်မံၤ တၢ်အိၣ်အသးပညိၣ်အစှၤကတၢၢ်တမံၤ
toast.need_at_least_2_data_points_per_ph: လိၣ်ဘၣ် data points အစှၤကတၢၢ် 2 လၢ phase တခါစုာ်စုာ်
toast.need_at_least_2_phases_in_the_grap: လိၣ်ဘၣ် phase အစှၤကတၢၢ် 2 လၢ Graph (baseline + intervention)

toast.not_a_valid_alloflow_snapshot_file: တမ့ၢ် AlloFlow snapshot လံာ်ဖၠူၣ် လၢအဘၣ်

toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_: Pop-ups ဘၣ်တၢ်တြီအီၤ — ဒိးထၢနုာ်ဒ် HTML လံာ်ဖၠူၣ်အသိး.
